author: shayrapetyan
name: Nairi - 9L 512D Vocab1024
blurb: Baseline architecture with encoder-decoder skip connections; model uses vocab_size=1024 with tokenizer vocab_size=8192 for compression efficiency
technique_summary: Baseline architecture + encoder-decoder skip connections + Muon optimizer + early stopping
architecture: 9L Transformer, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads, 1024 vocab, tied embeddings
